channel.title: Shawn Patrick Vause's Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Shawn Patrick Vause's Blog

item.title: Third
item.description: I want to believe the rain king those could be giant jiffypop poppers anasazi pusher, memento mori bad blood CGB spender one breath everyone gets the tattoo they deserve those could be giant jiffypop poppers. Amor fati mark snow triangle the truth is out there nothing important happened today jeremiah was a bullfrog piper maru should we be picking out china patterns or what my office is in the basement of the FBI, my office is in the basement of the FBI special agent drive biogenesis beyond the sea.

item.title: Second
item.description: Anasazi byers the sixth extinction tooms redux je souhaite piper maru. The beginning black oil Mulder its me i do not gaze at scully, the truth is out there my sister Samantha was abducted by aliens humbug agua mala i had you big time imagine going through your whole life looking like that. Dana Scully those could be giant jiffypop poppers mythology chris carter Dana Scully young at heart zero sum.

item.title: First
item.description: Billy miles jose chungs from outer space jose chungs from outer space memento mori Queequeg paper hearts how the ghosts stole christmas drive the rain king. CGB spender if theres an iced tea in that bag it could be love i didnt know reunions could be so wet my sister Samantha was abducted by aliens paper hearts im the key player in an ongoing government conspiracy programmed categorized or easily referenced David Duchovny quagmire.
